title: A Phone Call
opening: Hello, this is Sarah speaking. How can I help you?

t1.prompt: Hello, this is Sarah speaking. How can I help you?
t1.promptTranslation: Hello, this is Sarah speaking. How can I help you? — (English)

t2.prompt: Oh, hello there! And who are you trying to reach today?

keywords: i'd like to leave a message

t2.promptTranslation: Oh, hello there! And who are you trying to reach today? — (English)

t3.prompt: Certainly. May I ask who's calling, please?
t3.promptTranslation: Certainly. May I ask who's calling, please? — (English)

t4.prompt: I'm afraid [Target Person] isn't here at the moment. Would you like to leave a message, or would you like to know when they'll be back?

keywords: i'd like to leave a message

t4.promptTranslation: I'm afraid [Target Person] isn't here at the moment. Would you like to leave a message, or would you like to know when they'll be back? — (English)

t5.prompt: Certainly, I'll write that down. What would you like to say?
t5.promptTranslation: Certainly, I'll write that down. What would you like to say? — (English)

t6.prompt: They should be back around 3 PM this afternoon. Or would you prefer to leave a message?

keywords: i want to leave a message

t6.promptTranslation: They should be back around 3 PM this afternoon. Or would you prefer to leave a message? — (English)

t7.prompt: Okay, I've got that. I'll make sure [Target Person] gets your message as soon as possible. Is there anything else?
t7.promptTranslation: Okay, I've got that. I'll make sure [Target Person] gets your message as soon as possible. Is there anything else? — (English)

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please repeat?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please repeat? — (English)

t-end.prompt: Alright, thank you for calling. Goodbye!
t-end.promptTranslation: Alright, thank you for calling. Goodbye! — (English)
